category.scope_note: Hand-held, transportable, and lawn-and-garden electric and cordless power tools placed on the Vietnam market, compared against common China GB and GB/T baselines.

title.en: China-to-Vietnam Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Vietnam requirements: TCVN IEC 62841 safety, QCVN technical regulations with the CR mark, electromagnetic compatibility, MIC type approval for cordless radio, and substance and battery handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与越南要求差距对照：TCVN IEC 62841 安全标准、带 CR 标志的 QCVN 技术法规、电磁兼容、无绳无线电的 MIC 型式核准，以及物质与电池处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與越南要求差距對照：TCVN IEC 62841 安全標準、附 CR 標誌的 QCVN 技術法規、電磁相容、無繩無線電的 MIC 型式核准，以及物質與電池處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, designated-certification-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Vietnam law, TCVN standards, QCVN technical regulations, CR-mark certification scope, MIC type-approval rules, energy-labelling duties, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、指定认证机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行越南法律、TCVN 标准、QCVN 技术法规、CR 标志认证范围、MIC 型式核准规则、能效标识义务及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、指定認證機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南法律、TCVN 標準、QCVN 技術法規、CR 標誌認證範圍、MIC 型式核准規則、能效標識義務及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Vietnam, the practical baseline is product safety to TCVN IEC 62841 (Vietnam adoption of the IEC 62841 series), conformity to any applicable QCVN national technical regulation declared with the CR mark (chung nhan hop quy) through a designated certification body under STAMEQ, electromagnetic compatibility where in scope, MIC type approval for cordless tools with a radio module, and MOIT energy-labelling and MEPS only where the tool is a listed appliance. TCVN standards are voluntary unless invoked by a QCVN; the QCVN and CR-mark obligation is the mandatory layer.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入越南，实务基线是按 TCVN IEC 62841（越南采用 IEC 62841 系列）做产品安全，按适用的 QCVN 国家技术法规通过 STAMEQ 下指定认证机构完成符合性认证并加贴 CR 标志（chung nhan hop quy），在适用范围内满足电磁兼容，对带无线电模块的无绳工具取得 MIC 型式核准，仅当工具属于列名电器时才适用 MOIT 能效标识与 MEPS。TCVN 标准除非被某 QCVN 引用否则为自愿；QCVN 与 CR 标志义务才是强制层。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入越南，實務基線是按 TCVN IEC 62841（越南採用 IEC 62841 系列）做產品安全，按適用的 QCVN 國家技術法規通過 STAMEQ 下指定認證機構完成符合性認證並加貼 CR 標誌（chung nhan hop quy），在適用範圍內滿足電磁相容，對帶無線電模組的無繩工具取得 MIC 型式核准，僅當工具屬於列名電器時才適用 MOIT 能效標識與 MEPS。TCVN 標準除非被某 QCVN 引用否則為自願；QCVN 與 CR 標誌義務才是強制層。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
